positive: A symmetrical, central composition of bioluminescent, abstract botanical elements interwoven with minimalist celestial patterns. Imagine giant, stylized glowing lotus flowers and delicate vine structures floating in deep space. The overall aesthetic should be neo-art nouveau mixed with deep space photography. Utilize deep indigo, electric teal, cosmic violet, and pops of luminous gold for strong, vibrant contrast. The silhouette must be clean and bold, perfect for printing on dark apparel. Dramatic backlighting from the glowing flora creates clean, crisp edges. Highly detailed, vector illustration quality, maximalist yet elegant.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, low resolution, cropped, out of frame, bad anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, abstract mess, realistic human, logos, branding, ugly
